title: FOOD SHARE - 211info
text: ST JOHNS FOOD SHARE FOOD SHARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a food sharing program that distributes fruit, vegetables, bread, dairy, and other food items as available. Services are volunteer-run. 8100 N Lombard Street Portland, OR 97203 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday/Friday 10am-4pm, Wednesday 10am-noon Email (503) 286-0750 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 286-0750 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located on the corner of Lombard and Oswego. Parking lot and street parking are available. Bus lines #4 and #75 stop in front of the store. Services: Food Cooperatives Food Donation Programs Food Gleaning Programs If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
